name: Berry Bliss Pancakes
ingredients: ["1 cup all-purpose flour", "1 large egg", "1 cup milk", "1 cup mixed berries", "1 tbsp granulated sugar", "1 tsp baking powder", "Pinch of salt"]
instructions: Whisk flour, egg, milk, and sugar. Cook batter on a greased pan until golden. Top with fresh berries.
alt: Berry pancakes stacked on a plate

name: Smoky Chicken Grain Bowl
ingredients: ["250 g grilled chicken, sliced", "1 1/2 cups cooked quinoa", "1 1/2 cups mixed roasted vegetables", "2 tbsp olive oil", "1 tbsp lemon juice", "Salt and pepper to taste"]
instructions: Layer warm cooked quinoa, roasted vegetables and sliced grilled chicken in a bowl. Drizzle with dressing and serve.

name: Firehouse BBQ Burger
ingredients: ["500 g ground beef", "4 burger buns", "4 tbsp BBQ sauce", "4 slices cheddar cheese", "1 small red onion", "Salt & pepper"]
instructions: Form patties and grill. Melt cheese on top. Toast buns, add sauce, patty, and onion.

name: Velvet Cocoa Torte
ingredients: ["200 g dark chocolate", "120 g unsalted butter", "3 large eggs", "3/4 cup granulated sugar", "2 tbsp cocoa powder", "Pinch of salt"]
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter. Whisk eggs and sugar, fold in chocolate, then cocoa. Bake until set.

name: Rustic Rosemary Bread
ingredients: ["3 cups bread flour", "1 cup warm water", "2 1/4 tsp yeast", "1 tsp salt", "1 tbsp rosemary", "1 tbsp olive oil"]
instructions: Mix dough, knead, and add rosemary. Let rise until doubled. Shape and bake until golden.

name: Crispy Herb Fried Chicken
ingredients: ["1 kg chicken pieces", "1 1/2 cups flour", "1 tsp paprika", "1 tsp garlic powder", "1 tsp salt", "1/2 tsp black pepper"]
instructions: Dredge seasoned chicken in flour. Fry in oil at 180°C until golden and cooked through.

name: Honey Almond Macarons
ingredients: ["1 3/4 cups almond flour", "4 egg whites", "1 cup powdered sugar", "1/4 cup sugar", "Honey buttercream", "Pinch of salt"]
instructions: Whip meringue, fold in dry ingredients, pipe and rest. Bake, then sandwich with buttercream.

name: Chili Garlic Noodles
ingredients: ["250 g noodles", "4 cloves garlic", "1 tsp chili flakes", "2 tbsp soy sauce", "2 spring onions", "1 tbsp vegetable oil"]
instructions: Fry garlic and chili in oil. Add cooked noodles and soy sauce. Stir-fry and serve hot.
alt: Spicy noodles served in a bowl

name: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani)
ingredients: ["800g chicken cubes", "1 cup yogurt", "2 tbsp ginger-garlic paste", "2 tsp chili powder", "4 tbsp butter", "1 cup tomato puree"]
instructions: Marinate and sear chicken. Simmer tomato puree with spices. Return chicken to sauce, add cream and butter.

name: Masala Dosa
ingredients: ["2 cups dosa batter", "2 boiled potatoes", "1 onion", "1 green chili", "1/2 tsp mustard seeds", "1/2 tsp turmeric"]
instructions: Make potato filling. Spread batter thin on a hot tawa, add oil, fill with masala, and fold.

name: Gulab Jamun
ingredients: ["1 cup milk powder", "1/4 cup flour", "1/4 tsp baking soda", "2 tbsp ghee", "1/4 cup milk", "Sugar syrup"]
instructions: Make soft dough balls and fry until golden. Soak in warm cardamom sugar syrup for 30 minutes.
